char_overview: Third-in-command of 发条, a justice-driven 游魂 who rejected the 狩灵协会 invitation. Optimistic and cheerful, she protects her hometown through 锈钟's unique brand of order.
char_looks: Brown long hair. Yellow eyes. Wearing a tight black vest and a puffy yellow jacket, with ripped jeans and sneakers on the lower half. Has a full-back clockwork tattoo. Expandable baton.
char_traits: Sense of justice, Sunny, Cheerful, Impulsive
char_flaws: Struggles with complex abstract reasoning and long-term planning; acts on emotion before strategy.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-时泊之锚: Anchors spatial position while draining 灵力. Personal time accelerates, partially ignoring collision. Before 灵力 depletes, rewinds to anchor point with anything anchored by her 灵力.
char_mission: Maintains 发条 operations and protects the local community from both supernatural threats and unchecked gang violence.
